user.title: Set up GrowAssistant – Crop Steering
user.description: Select the existing Home Assistant helpers and entities GrowAssistant will use. Pump control is not implemented in v0.1.

data_description.name: Display name for this GrowAssistant instance.
data_description.pump_switch: Switch entity for real irrigation pump hardware, or an input_boolean helper for safe test/dummy pump simulation. Automatic pump control is not implemented in v0.1.
data_description.vwc_sensor: Select one or more sensor entities that report substrate volumetric water content. Multiple valid values are averaged automatically. Unavailable or invalid sensors are ignored.
data_description.drain_sensor: Optional binary sensor that indicates irrigation drain/runoff activity.
data_description.drain_tray_sensor: Optional binary sensor that indicates a drain tray leak or high-water condition.
data_description.led_sunrise: Input datetime helper for the grow light sunrise/start time. Create this helper as Time only; Date and time may work but is not recommended. Example light start: 19:00:00. Over-midnight schedules are supported.
data_description.led_sunset: Input datetime helper for the grow light sunset/end time. Create this helper as Time only; Date and time may work but is not recommended. Example light end: 07:00:00. Over-midnight schedules are supported.
data_description.p1_mode: Select whether P1 is sensor-controlled or manual / interval schedule controlled. No input_select helper is required.
data_description.p2_mode: Select whether P2 is sensor-controlled or manual / interval schedule controlled. No input_select helper is required.
data_description.p0_transpiration_min: Input number helper for the minimum P0 transpiration duration in minutes.
data_description.p1_duration_min: Input number helper for the P1 window duration in minutes.
data_description.p1_interval_min: Optional input number helper for the P1 irrigation interval in minutes.
data_description.p1_shot_duration_s: Input number helper for the P1 irrigation shot duration in seconds.
data_description.p2_interval_min: Optional input number helper for the P2 irrigation interval in minutes.
data_description.p2_shot_duration_s: Input number helper for the P2 irrigation shot duration in seconds.
data_description.p2_shots: Input number helper for the target number of P2 irrigation shots.
data_description.p1_soak_min: Input number helper for P1 soak time in minutes.
data_description.p2_soak_min: Input number helper for P2 soak time in minutes.
data_description.p2_end_offset_min: Input number helper for the P2 end offset before LED sunset in minutes.
data_description.field_capacity_vwc: Input number helper for substrate field capacity VWC.
data_description.p1_start_vwc: Input number helper for the VWC threshold that starts P1 behavior.
data_description.p2_vwc_drop: Input number helper for the VWC drop target used during P2.
data_description.p2_ref_vwc: Input number helper for the P2 reference VWC.
data_description.vwc_cap: Optional input number helper for the maximum VWC cap.
data_description.vwc_hyst: Optional input number helper for VWC hysteresis.
data_description.p1_active: Input boolean helper that tracks whether P1 is currently active.
data_description.p1_done: Input boolean helper that tracks whether P1 has completed for the day.
data_description.p1_window_opened_today: Input boolean helper that tracks whether the P1 window opened today.
data_description.p1_shots_done: Counter helper that tracks completed P1 shots.
data_description.p2_shots_done: Counter helper that tracks completed P2 shots.
data_description.last_shot: Input datetime helper for the last irrigation shot timestamp.

abort.already_configured: GrowAssistant – Crop Steering is already configured.

reset_cycle.name: Reset cycle
reset_cycle.description: Reset daily/cycle state helpers without touching the configured pump switch or input_boolean test helper.

start_p1.name: Start P1
start_p1.description: Prepare P1 helpers and backdate the last-shot helper so existing automation can allow the first P1 shot. This service does not turn on the pump.

stop_pump.name: Stop pump
stop_pump.description: Turn off only the configured pump switch or input_boolean test helper as an explicit manual/safety stop.

init.title: GrowAssistant – Crop Steering options
init.description: Change P1/P2 steering modes after setup. These options override the modes selected during setup.

data_description.p1_mode: Select whether P1 is sensor-controlled or manual / interval schedule controlled.
data_description.p2_mode: Select whether P2 is sensor-controlled or manual / interval schedule controlled.
